## Layer 1 EAT-QUEUE summary (lane **godot**)

### Step 0 (wrappers)
No `approved: true` ingest/roadmap wrappers required action; nothing applied.

### A.0.4
`pool_sync` ran: **copied_count=1** (`operator-bootstrap-exec-godot-first-mint-20260410T130100Z` from central pool → `.technical/parallel/godot/prompt-queue.jsonl`).

### Dispatched
| id | mode | outcome |
|----|------|--------|
| `operator-bootstrap-exec-godot-first-mint-20260410T130100Z` | `RESUME_ROADMAP` (`bootstrap-execution-track`) | **Success** |

**Nested gatekeeper checklist:** `nested_validator_first`, `ira_post_first_validator`, and `nested_validator_second` all **`task_tool_invoked: true`**. No `state_hygiene_failure` as primary blocker; residual gap **`missing_roll_up_gates`** (expected until first execution **deepen**).

### Layer 1 (b1) — hostile `Task(validator)`
Invoked **`roadmap_handoff_auto`** separately from Layer 2. Verdict: **medium / needs_work**, **`primary_code: missing_roll_up_gates`**, **hard_block=false**, **`state_hygiene_failure=false`**. Report: `.technical/Validator/layer1-roadmap-handoff-auto-operator-bootstrap-exec-godot-first-mint-20260410T130100Z.md`.

### Watcher-Result
**Canonical** `3-Resources/Watcher-Result.md` and mirror **`3-Resources/Watcher-Result-godot.md`**: two lines for **`requestId: operator-bootstrap-exec-godot-first-mint-20260410T130100Z`** — **`segment: VALIDATE`** then primary **success** (provisional advisory debt).

### A.7 + follow-up
- Removed consumed id from **central pool** and replaced track **PQ** with follow-up only.
- **Central pool** now: sandbox bootstrap line + new follow-up line (fanout parity).
- **Godot PQ** (`/.technical/parallel/godot/prompt-queue.jsonl`): **`followup-deepen-exec-p1-first-mint-godot-20260410T131500Z`** (`RESUME_ROADMAP` **deepen**, execution track, balance bundle).

### Run-Telemetry
`.technical/Run-Telemetry/godot/queue-layer1-eatq-godot-20260407T121500Z.md` (roadmap subagent also logged under `godot/` per its return).

### A.7a GitForge
**Ran** after clean queue success: vault commits recorded; engine export **`godot-genesis-mythos-master`** pushed; integration merge into engine branch **aborted** (conflicts) — GitForge proceeded with **Step 1b–style** Roadmap + anchors sync per its return. Details in `3-Resources/Second-Brain/Docs/git-audit-log.md`.

### Pass 3
No extra inline repair drain this run (single initial dispatch; follow-up is forward **deepen**, not repair-class).

## Layer 1 EAT-QUEUE summary (lane **godot**, prompt queue only)

### Step 0 (wrappers)
No Decision Wrapper with **`approved: true`** in frontmatter was found under `Ingest/Decisions/**` (only instructional text matched). Nothing applied.

### A.0.4 `pool_sync`
Ran `pool_sync` for `--lane godot` -> **target** `.technical/parallel/godot/prompt-queue.jsonl`. It **copied 1 line** from the central pool (`operator-bootstrap-exec-godot-first-mint-20260410T130100Z`). After that, the **on-disk** godot PQ no longer contained `followup-deepen-exec-p1-first-mint-godot-20260410T131500Z` (your Layer 0 hand-off still carried the full entry, so dispatch used that).

### Dispatched
| Entry | Mode | Outcome |
|--------|------|--------|
| `followup-deepen-exec-p1-first-mint-godot-20260410T131500Z` | `RESUME_ROADMAP` deepen (execution) | **Provisional success** — vault work reported (Phase 1 execution primary under `Roadmap/Execution/Phase-1-Conceptual-Foundation-and-Core-Architecture/`). Roadmap subagent returned **`task_harden_result.contract_satisfied: false`** — nested **`Task(validator)` / `Task(IRA)`** could not run in that host (**`tool_unavailable`**), so balance nested attestation is **not** closed in Layer 2. |

### Layer 1 (b1) hostile validator
`Task(validator)` **`roadmap_handoff_auto`** completed: **medium** / **needs_work**, **`primary_code: safety_unknown_gap`**, **`state_hygiene_failure: false`**. Report: `.technical/Validator/roadmap-handoff-auto-godot-exec-p1-followup-deepen-20260410T131500Z.md`.

### A.5c / A.7
- Appended **`followup-deepen-exec-p11-spine-godot-20260410T131600Z`** to **both** `.technical/prompt-queue.jsonl` and `.technical/parallel/godot/prompt-queue.jsonl`.
- Treated **`followup-deepen-exec-p1-first-mint-…`** as **consumed** for this run (logical id from the hand-off; it was absent on disk after `pool_sync`).
- **GitForge:** skipped (nested contract not satisfied / provisional path).

### Observability
- **Watcher-Result:** two lines for `followup-deepen-exec-p1-first-mint-godot-20260410T131500Z` (**`segment: VALIDATE`** then primary) in `3-Resources/Watcher-Result.md` and mirror `3-Resources/Watcher-Result-godot.md`.
- **Run-Telemetry:** `.technical/Run-Telemetry/godot/eatq-layer1-godot-followup-p1-20260407T065611Z.md`

### Current PQ (both pool + godot track)
Two lines: **`operator-bootstrap-exec-godot-first-mint-20260410T130100Z`** (still present) and **`followup-deepen-exec-p11-spine-godot-20260410T131600Z`**. If bootstrap is already idempotently satisfied in vault, you may drop that line manually on the next hygiene pass.

### Pass 2 / Pass 3
No cleanup / inline repair waves were required for this run.
